commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer handling and contributor-provided real Bun proof are needed; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply from this review.; Cleared: The diff only changes launcher error classification and test fixture code; I found no concrete security or supply-chain concern. commands.review_summary:
The branch updates `openclaw.mjs` to treat Bun raw-specifier module-miss messages as direct optional-import misses and adds a launcher e2e probe for direct versus transitive misses.

PR surface: Tests +48, Other +6. Total +54 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main rejects non-`ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` module-miss objects, and the linked report shows Bun emits the raw-specifier miss shape. I did not mark it reproduced because Bun was not installed for a live current-main run.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer handling and contributor-provided real Bun proof are needed; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply from this review.
